name: @sdkwork/terminal-local-runtime-app-sdk-workspace
description: SDKWork Terminal local runtime HTTP generated SDK boundary.

scripts.generate: node ../../sync-local-runtime-openapi.mjs && sdkgen generate -i ../openapi/sdkwork-terminal-local-runtime-app-api.openapi.yaml -o generated/server-openapi -n sdkwork-terminal-local-runtime-app-sdk -t custom -l typescript --package-name "@sdkwork/terminal-local-runtime-app-sdk" --client-name "SdkworkTerminalLocalRuntimeClient" --api-prefix "/" --sdk-version 0.2.59 && npm run build --prefix generated/server-openapi
